QF.id: XIII Introduction to the Underlying Markets_2

question.text: According to the BIS Triennial Central Bank Survey 2022, what is the approximate average daily turnover of OTC foreign exchange globally?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The BIS 2022 survey reports average daily OTC FX turnover of approximately USD 7.5 trillion, with FX swaps being the largest component at USD 3,810 billion. **The Trap:** USD 5.3 trillion was the figure from the previous BIS survey (2019). Candidates who studied older materials may select this outdated number. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series I Ch1 provides these exact figures. Series XVI (Commodity Derivatives) contrasts this with commodity market volumes. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The forex market is the largest financial market globally — its daily turnover exceeds the annual GDP of most countries.
